title: The Age of The Sovereignpreneur Has Begun
summary: Jordan Urbs argues that AI and Bitcoin together enable a new economic actor called the "sovereignpreneur" who achieves sovereignty over money, production, and time. He presents Bitcoin as monetary sovereignty, AI as labor leverage, and outlines a Build/Share/Sell model for solo builders in the AI era, delivered as a keynote at Bitcoin 2026.
